creator: araujo@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I've marked IGNORE the www/node-devel and also merged it to www/node, 
also I've updated www/node to 0.4.2 and put an entry into UPDATING file 
about those changes and to let users know that is necessary do some 
migration if they want to follow the stable upstream.
